message:
feat(accounts+workflows): multi-account exhaustion handling (wa-4r7)

When all configured accounts are at usage limits, the system now fails
safe instead of returning a raw "no selection" result:

accounts.rs:
- AccountExhaustionInfo struct capturing check count, earliest reset
  time, and failed selection explanation
- parse_reset_at_ms(): parse ISO 8601 and epoch-ms reset times
- find_earliest_reset(): scan accounts for soonest quota reset
- build_exhaustion_info(): build exhaustion info from accounts list
- days_from_epoch(): date helper for ISO 8601 parsing
- 14 new tests (parse_reset_at_ms variants, find_earliest_reset
  edge cases, exhaustion info serde round-trip)

workflows.rs (HandleUsageLimits step 2):
- When account selection returns None, fetch all accounts, compute
  earliest reset time, and build an AllAccountsExhausted fallback plan
- Logs exhaustion state with structured tracing fields
- Returns fallback_plan_to_step_result (Done with fallback flag)
  instead of raw Done, enabling downstream detection

All 36 accounts tests and 22 fallback path tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
